combos.notes: Links on hit and frame traps on block. Less rewarding from 5MP but easier to confirm than the TC.
Simple and straight-forward starter for a lot of what Rashid wants to do. Extends very easily with OD Arabian Cyclone midscreen and partial charge Whirlwind Shot in the corner.
Relatively standard link, usually used from a jump-in combo.
Hit-confirmable link for more damage.
Very consistent thanks to 2MK's great reach.
Good to know, as 236LP hits three times and can blast through Drive Impact's armor.
Works at point-blank range.
Works from slightly farther out, still retains good routing options.
Longest reaching punish from 5LP.
2LP is 1 frame more plus on hit than 5LP which allows this link to work.
Route into TC from 5MP.
Much more consistent in terms of the spacings it works at.
It's not often that an ender is included here, but this is unique to punish counter.
Rashid needs extra hitstun in order to combo into HK Eagle Spike from 5HP. Thankfully, 5HP is quite fast and works well as a whiff punisher.
2HP is Rashid's highest damage linking starter, but the link doesn't work from all ranges. It's difficult to convert from neutral but it's fantastic as a punish for anything -12 or worse.
214MP can be used as a punish starter against things like OD reversals or supers.
Basic overhead confirm. Rashid has a lot of options from this starter thanks to the additional momentum from Drive Rush.
Easily hit-confirmable double low string.
5HP also links from here, but this is much better for pressure and is also an easy confirm.
Reliable route to secure either the 5MP TC or an Eagle Spike knockdown.
Deals more damage by skipping a light normal, on top of having better scaling overall.
Rashid's highest damage DRC extension, but usually limited to DP punishes.
